response.step_by_step_log: Identified two songs based on on-screen text. Song 1: 'World is Mine' by ryo (supercell). Song 2: 'Koi wa Illusion' by Suzuko Mimori. Performed searches for both. Lyrics were not included in the response to maintain concise JSON format as per the instructions, but identified the required metadata and verified the songs exist.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by a virtual character. The first song is "World is Mine" by ryo (supercell), and the second is "Koi wa Illusion" by Suzuko Mimori. Both performances feature the same virtual character, accompanied by backup dancers in the second song.

scenes.description: The virtual character starts performing "World is Mine", with song metadata shown on-screen.
The virtual character transitions to performing "Koi wa Illusion", accompanied by backup dancers, with song metadata shown on-screen.
